title: Principal Frontend Developer at ABB India International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Principal Frontend Developer at ABB India International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
ABB India International Enterprises, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Delhi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About ABB India International Enterprises:
ABB India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ABB India International Enterprises!
